testcase.name: test_anonym_filter
testcase.failure:
self = <fp.fp.FreeProxy object at 0x103ca7d50>, repeat = False
def get_proxy_list(self, repeat): try: buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, self.__website(repeat)) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) > c.perform() E pycurl.error: (35, 'Recv failure: Connection reset by peer')

testcase.name: test_invalid_proxy
testcase.failure:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_invalid_proxy>
def test_invalid_proxy(self): test = FreeProxy() test.get_proxy_list = MagicMock(return_value=['111.111.11:2222']) > self.assertRaisesRegex( FreeProxyException, 'There are no working proxies at this time.', test.get)
test_proxy.py:21: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ fp/fp.py:82: in get working_proxy = self.__check_if_proxy_is_working(proxies) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def __check_if_proxy_is_working(self, proxies): url = f'{self.schema}://{self.url}' ip = proxies[self.schema].split(':')[1][2:] buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, url) c.setopt(c.PROXY, proxies[self.schema]) > c.setopt(c.TIMEOUT, self.timeout) E TypeError: invalid arguments to setopt
fp/fp.py:101: TypeError
